scope_statement: EIOPA-published Solvency II guidelines, opinions, supervisory statements, and ITS/RTS technical standards covering insurance, reinsurance, insurance groups, and IORP II pension funds across the EU/EEA.
scope_exclusions: EIOPA Q&A documents (informal guidance, not officially numbered)
CJEU judgments interpreting EU insurance law
EBA / ESMA solo publications (covered by sibling MCPs)
Draft consultation papers (only finalised publications are included)

sources.name: EIOPA Publications
sources.authority: European Insurance and Occupational Pensions Authority
sources.completeness_note: Scrapes four EIOPA document-library sections: guidelines, technical-standards, opinions, supervisory-statements. Each publication is normalised into either a guideline row or a technical-standard row.

gaps.reason: Informal guidance, not officially numbered or versioned
English is the authoritative language for EU regulatory purposes
Out of scope; per-jurisdiction MCPs cover NCA-level material
